name: OpenClaw Workspace Governance
description: Workspace governance lifecycle for OpenClaw: bootstrap, migrate, audit, and controlled BOOT apply.

runtimeGateEnabled.description: Enable runtime hard gate hooks (before_prompt_build, before_tool_call, agent_end).

runtimeGatePolicy.description: Optional runtime allow/deny policy for non-system custom shell commands. Official `openclaw ...` system-channel commands are allow-by-default and not deny-blocked.

allowShellPrefixes.description: Case-insensitive shell command prefixes that may bypass governance write preflight (single-command only; no shell operators).

allowShellRegex.description: Case-insensitive regex rules that may bypass governance write preflight (single-command only; no shell operators).

denyShellPrefixes.description: Case-insensitive shell command prefixes that are always blocked by governance runtime policy.

denyShellRegex.description: Case-insensitive regex rules that are always blocked by governance runtime policy.
